long_description:
[METAL] Deployment High CPU Usage is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/bare_metal_server_cpu_memory_alerts.html
TIP Situation: Deployment container high CPU usage
TIP Short Description: mzone = mzone717-zonelet02 deployment = console-proxy-deployment pod = console-proxy-deployment-67d6456d47-4lgqs container = resolver is using >85% of CPU limit
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-bare-metal-server:::mzone717-zonelet02::

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
